_comment: Dashboard 'Trending This Week'. Edit freely, commit & push — Cloudflare auto-deploys. Covers are looked up automatically from title + author via Open Library, so you do NOT need cover IDs. 'badge' is one of: 'hot' | 'rising' | 'new'.
